intro: The passage opens into a vast, pillared hall. The dark at the far end shifts, uncoils, and rises. There is no door but the one behind it - and it will not let you pass.
victory: as you deal the final blow, the creature shudders and crashes to the stone, still at last. The way ahead is open.
reward_text: Standing over it, as it turns to ash, your wounds knit shut and your resolve returns. (+full HP)
